obj_ch5_LW02W_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0: \ED* She^1, uh^1, told me to get you./

obj_ch5_LW02W_slash_Step_0_gml_209_0: \ET* You wouldn't wanna see the Festival first..^1. would you?/
obj_ch5_LW02W_slash_Step_0_gml_210_0: \ER* Yeah^1, I saw everything with Noelle^1, but like.../
obj_ch5_LW02W_slash_Step_0_gml_212_0: \E2* I still wanna see how you'd react to stuff^1, too^1, y'know?/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_91_0: \EO* It Says I'm Very Tall And Beautiful/%

obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_168_0: \EQ* Seems like she's going to have a really special day^1, Kris./
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_169_0: \E2* I wonder if..^1. there's any way we can help her./%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_211_0: \EX* Ah^1, Lancer^1, I didn't..^1. notice you..^1. biking on the ceiling./
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_213_0: \EE* Lancer^1? Who's that^1? I'm just a poor innocent boy!!/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_214_0: \ED* An innocent boy^1, looking for some innocenter heroes.../
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_215_0: \EE* To help design an outfit for my friend^1, Susie!/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_319_0: \E1* Ho ho ho^1! I smell with my nose^1, a wonderful clothes!/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_351_0: \E2* All three of us made a costume for you!!/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_353_0: \EK* Costume^1? You mean^1, uh^1, an outfit?/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_355_0: \E1* What is an outfit if not^1, a costume of love???/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_356_0: \E8* And the Festival^1, is the Halloween of Romance!!/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_358_0: \EK* Uhh^1, yeah?^1? I'll uh^1, take a look!/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_421_0: \EK* ..^1. dude^1, this is just a picture of my normal clothes./
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_423_0: \E1* Hoho^1, yes^1! Can't mess with the best!/%

obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_430_0: \E9* Otherwise^1, kaboom^1! The soft cream girl may be destroyed!/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_436_0: \E1* Umm^1, I can have it if you don't want it.../%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_452_0: \EK* ..^1. thanks^1, you guys^1, but maybe I don't need to.../%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_639_0: \EC* Pretty sure I look the same./
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_643_0: \E1* The Filename Even Has A (1) After It/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_647_0: \EE* Okay But Not Now It's Too Formal/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_650_0: \EK* How about I just try on the^1, uh^1, hat?/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_785_0: \E2* Can't beat the classic Susie^1, right^1, Kris?/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_787_0: \E2* Yes^1, me too^1! Now^1, don't forget your accessory!!/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_848_0: \E3* It doubles as a cookie^1. If you get hungry./
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_850_0: \EA* Heh^1, well^1, I'll try not to eat it right away./%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_887_0: \EN* Alright^1, think I'm..^1. good as I'm gonna be^1, I guess./%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_905_0: \E9* Thanks^1, guys^1! I'll put it back on before I leave!/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_992_0: \E2* Don't worry^1, Susie^1! From what I know of "Noelle..."/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_993_0: \E3* She's probably just as excited and preparing as you!/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_995_0: \EN* ..^1. yeah^1. She..^1. asked me in the first place^1, right?/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_997_0: \E3* Yes-a-mundo^1! I bet she's trimming her dewclaws right now!/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_998_0: \E1* Rasping her eyelashes..^1. gathering you beetles..^1. and more!/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_1009_0: \E3* If you need any MP3s for her^1, you can use mine!/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_1011_0: \EA* Heh^1, I think she likes..^1. rock music^1. You got any of that?/
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_1013_0: \E3* No^1! But I can smash two stones together if it helps!/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_1061_0: \EE* Oh Susie Darling Fix Your Collar Before You Go Out/%
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_1087_0: \EK* Uhh^1, thanks^1. I think before was better./%

obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_1135_0: \EO* Than Her Two Little Daughters Getting Married/

obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_1193_0: * SUSIE^1! Lemme tell you some EXCLUSIVE NOELLEFACTS!/

obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_1197_0: * Use this information..^1. as you will!/%
